Team","details":"Uses EIP-1167 minimal proxy pattern for gas-efficient deployment.      Creates accounts deterministically from the passkey public key coordinates      using CREATE2. The passkey is set during account initialization. Features:  - Deterministic address generation from passkey public key (CREATE2)  - Gas-efficient deployment via minimal proxy clones  - Counterfactual address prediction before deployment  - Automatic passkey signer setup during account creation Security considerations:  - Account addresses are deterministic based on pubKey + salt  - Implementation is immutable and set at factory deployment  - An EOA owner is still required as account recovery mechanism  - Public key coordinates are validated before account creation","errors":{"FailedDeployment()":[{"details":"The deployment failed."}],"InsufficientBalance(uint256,uint256)":[{"details":"The ETH balance of the account is not enough to perform the operation."}]},"events":{"PasskeyAccountCreated(address,address,uint256,uint256,uint256)":{"params":{"account":"The deployed account address","owner":"The owner address (recovery key)","pubKeyX":"The x coordinate of the passkey public key","pubKeyY":"The y coordinate of the passkey public key","salt":"The salt used for deterministic deployment"}}},"kind":"dev","methods":{"constructor":{"params":{"_entryPoint":"The ERC-4337 EntryPoint contract address"}},"createAccount(address,uint256,uint256,uint256)":{"details":"Uses EIP-1167 minimal proxy for gas-efficient deployment.      The account is initialized with the owner address and then the passkey      signer is set. createAccount(address,uint256,uint256,ui.details: Uses EIP-1167 minimal proxy for gas-efficient deployment.      The account is initialized with the owner address and then the passkey      signer is set. The deterministic address is derived from the passkey      public key coordinates and the salt.

params.owner: The owner/recovery address for the account
params.pubKeyX: The x coordinate of the P256 passkey public key
params.pubKeyY: The y coordinate of the P256 passkey public key

returns.account: The created or existing account instance

getAddress(uint256,uint256,uint256).details: Useful for pre-computing addresses for gasless onboarding

params.pubKeyX: The x coordinate of the P256 passkey public key
params.pubKeyY: The y coordinate of the P256 passkey public key

returns._0: The predicted address of the account

ACCOUNT_IMPLEMENTATION().notice: Account implementation contract (immutable for gas savings)

createAccount(address,uint256,uint256,ui.notice: Create a new account with a passkey signer, or return existing one

getAddress(uint256,uint256,uint256).notice: Get the counterfactual address of a passkey account before deployment
